    Namespace Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad

    Classes

    CadAcdsList

    The Cad Object List

    CadAppIdDictionary

    Collection of cad layouts

    CadBinaryCodeValue

    Cad binary Code Value class

    CadBlockDictionary

    CAD blocks collection

    CadBlockRecordList

    The cad view dictionary The following group codes apply to VPORT symbol table entries. The VPORT table is unique: it may contain several entries with the same name (indicating a multiple-viewport configuration). The entries corresponding to the active viewport configuration all have the name *ACTIVE. The first such entry describes the current viewport. Since the name is not unique, we use List as a container

    CadClassList

    CAD classes collection

    CadCodeValue

    Code Value class

    CadDimensionDictionary

    Dimension styles dictionary.

    CadImage

    Cad image class

    CadLayersList

    Layer tables list Since the name is not unique, we use List as a container

    CadLayoutDictionary

    Collection of cad layouts

    CadLineTypesDictionary

    Represents dictionary with types of lines.

    CadStylesList

    List of Cad styles

    CadUcsList

    The cad view dictionary The following group codes apply to VPORT symbol table entries. The VPORT table is unique: it may contain several entries with the same name (indicating a multiple-viewport configuration). The entries corresponding to the active viewport configuration all have the name *ACTIVE. The first such entry describes the current viewport. Since the name is not unique, we use List as a container

    CadViewList

    The cad view dictionary The following group codes apply to VPORT symbol table entries. The VPORT table is unique: it may contain several entries with the same name (indicating a multiple-viewport configuration). The entries corresponding to the active viewport configuration all have the name *ACTIVE. The first such entry describes the current viewport. Since the name is not unique, we use List as a container

    CadVportList

    The cad viewport dictionary The following group codes apply to VPORT symbol table entries. The VPORT table is unique: it may contain several entries with the same name (indicating a multiple-viewport configuration). The entries corresponding to the active viewport configuration all have the name *ACTIVE. The first such entry describes the current viewport. Since the name is not unique, we use List as a container
